query:
ALTER TABLE design_submissions 
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'rejected') DEFAULT 'pending',
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approver_id INT NULL,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval_date BIGINT NULL,
ADD COLUMN founding_house_approval_notes TEXT NULL,
ADD COLUMN is_original_design BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN is_logo_design BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
